The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] had a '''starfighter'''. It was carried by the bounty hunter aboard [[Gender/Legends|her]] [[Aurra Sing's blockade runner|cruiser]]. Sing would leave her cruiser drifting and seemingly helpless to distract her pursuers, then surprise-attack them in her fighter. The craft had four powerful [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

{{Ship-stub}}
